name: Cala MCP
tagline: Connect OpenClaw and Cursor to Cala's MCP for verified knowledge search.
description: Use Cala's verified knowledge layer from OpenClaw: natural-language search, structured queries, and entity lookup. Install from ClawHub, add your Cala API key in skill config, then ask your agent anything—the skill calls Cala's API for you. No MCP or MCPorter required. Get a free API key at console.cala.ai.
